pr-evidence/harden-benchmark-generation-.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reported no code findings, confirmed compatibility with zero tokens/timing, empty successful output text, first-party string metadata, and non-aborting invalid-generation capture; noted only that changes should be committed before merge.
what_changed: Validated BenchmarkGeneration output text, token counts, finite timing values, and metadata shape at the engine-output boundary.
Added regression coverage proving invalid generation schema is captured as benchmark error measurements instead of aborting runs.
pr-evidence/harden-benchmark-generation-.why: V1 benchmark runs should fail closed on malformed engine outputs while preserving non-aborting measurement collection for per-arm errors.
